title: draggable.grid.header.toolbar.SortZone: moveTo() => keep grid container columns in sync
draggable.table.header.toolbar.SortZone: reset the background-color for th tags while dragging
examples.ConfigurationViewport: global theme switch => assign the new theme to the app main view
main.DomEvents: domEventListener() => remove default drag&drop part
grid.header.Toolbar: clean separation for draggable & sortable (items)
component.Base: afterSetWrapperCls() => use this.update() instead of custom logic
draggable.toolbar.DragZone: adjustToolbarItemCls() => the wrapperCls does not always get applied
draggable.toolbar.SortZone: no longer needs to adjust pointer events
draggable.DragProxyComponent: disable pointer events globally in case the body contains .neo-is-dragging
main.addon.DragDrop: onDragMove() => be more restrictive with left & top positioning
grid.header.Toolbar: enhance the column drag&drop to be at the same level as tab headers
